publishedAbstract: * In OpenShift Data Foundations 4.16, after creating an the cluster step by step according to the GUI prompts, it was found that the pg_num of the ocs-storagecluster-cephblockpool created by default is always 1. This can lead to performance issues.
publishedTitle: Autoscaling of pg_num in Ceph pool not working in OpenShift Data Foundations 4.16
